svg.title: Agent Saul production deployment topology
svg.desc: Architecture diagram: Railway compute plane with public and private zones, external managed data plane, and external SaaS integrations.
svg.text: Agent Saul · Railway compute plane · managed data plane · external SaaS

g.text: DNS · WAF · bot protection · Access policies

svg.text: Railway compute plane · railway.internal private networking

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Frontend service architecture in Agent Saul')

sendPrompt('What does the Celery Beat scheduler handle?')

sendPrompt('How is Jenkins deployed and what pipeline stages does it run?')
sendPrompt('What is Redis used for in Agent Saul and what should it not be used for?')
sendPrompt('Explain the RabbitMQ queue separation strategy in Agent Saul')
